spec_match.rationale: Applies font-variant-emoji at the inherited chat surface level and demonstrates a direct per-message override on system notices.

interactive.rationale: Dropdown flips the thread value, composer and quick buttons append messages, and the system notice button adds a bubble that keeps its text override.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature card now promises inherited thread styling with a system-notice override, matching the page.

edge_cases.rationale: Per-message inheritance, system-message overrides, and simulated macOS/Windows/Linux platform defaults are all visible and interactive.

design_system.rationale: Bubble styles via CSS variables; no static-card pattern.

summary: Verified in chrome-devtools-mcp with Headless Chrome Canary 151 on 2026-06-06: loaded /v131/css-font-variant-emoji/chat-bubble/, changed the thread style to emoji, selected the Linux without emoji font simulation, sent `Retest ☀ ☎ ♥`, clicked system notice, and confirmed the stream/user messages computed to `font-variant-emoji: emoji` while system bubbles computed to `text`. The platform preview cards computed macOS and Windows samples to `emoji` and Linux-no-emoji to `text`; the ChromeStatus link is present and the console and failed-request list were clean.
